records.m_Talk_ENG: Good. We made it in time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good. We made it in time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good. We made it in time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Glad to see you're safe, Seosaeng.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Glad to see you're safe, Seosaeng.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Glad to see you're safe, Seosaeng.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the ones who saved us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the ones who saved us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the ones who saved us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just happened to be stopping by your workshop. Timing worked out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just happened to be stopping by your workshop. Timing worked out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just happened to be stopping by your workshop. Timing worked out.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
There's someone else who still needs help. This way
8v!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
There's someone else who still needs help. This way
8v!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
There's someone else who still needs help. This way
8v!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No need to worry. She'll take them all down without breaking a sweat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No need to worry. She'll take them all down without breaking a sweat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No need to worry. She'll take them all down without breaking a sweat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So please. Sit. I can't stay long, and I'd appreciate your understanding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So please. Sit. I can't stay long, and I'd appreciate your understanding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So please. Sit. I can't stay long, and I'd appreciate your understanding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You seem to know me. Have we met before?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You seem to know me. Have we met before?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You seem to know me. Have we met before?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've never met face-to-face. But we do know each other.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've never met face-to-face. But we do know each other.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've never met face-to-face. But we do know each other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like you've been putting that weapon I gave you to good use.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like you've been putting that weapon I gave you to good use.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like you've been putting that weapon I gave you to good use.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vI see.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vI see.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vI see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you were the Senior of Chamber?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you were the Senior of Chamber?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you were the Senior of Chamber?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Senior
8v? Like, the top official at the Administration?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Senior
8v? Like, the top official at the Administration?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Senior
8v? Like, the top official at the Administration?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not exactly, but not wrong either. The Senior oversees most things tied to the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not exactly, but not wrong either. The Senior oversees most things tied to the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not exactly, but not wrong either. The Senior oversees most things tied to the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that includes keeping tabs on former staff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that includes keeping tabs on former staff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that includes keeping tabs on former staff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought my memory wipe meant you'd stop interfering with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought my memory wipe meant you'd stop interfering with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought my memory wipe meant you'd stop interfering with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not the only former employee in our files.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not the only former employee in our files.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not the only former employee in our files.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those traitors who attacked you are also under our watch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those traitors who attacked you are also under our watch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those traitors who attacked you are also under our watch.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Traitors
8v? You mean the ones who ambushed us?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Traitors
8v? You mean the ones who ambushed us?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Traitors
8v? You mean the ones who ambushed us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They once served the Administration loyally.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They once served the Administration loyally.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They once served the Administration loyally.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Whatever made them change, the reasons likely differ
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Whatever made them change, the reasons likely differ
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Whatever made them change, the reasons likely differ
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now, they're united under one cause. To bring down the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now, they're united under one cause. To bring down the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now, they're united under one cause. To bring down the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then why target us? If that's true, Master isn't even part of the Administration anymore!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then why target us? If that's true, Master isn't even part of the Administration anymore!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then why target us? If that's true, Master isn't even part of the Administration anymore!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
We can't say for sure. But
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
We can't say for sure. But
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
We can't say for sure. But
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: They seem to see you, Seosaeng, as a threat to their goal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They seem to see you, Seosaeng, as a threat to their goal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They seem to see you, Seosaeng, as a threat to their goal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So the Administration helped me just to maintain that threat to their goal?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So the Administration helped me just to maintain that threat to their goal?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So the Administration helped me just to maintain that threat to their goal?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I cannot answer that. The response is beyond my authority.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I cannot answer that. The response is beyond my authority.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I cannot answer that. The response is beyond my authority.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So even a Senior doesn't have full authority. Guess someone even higher is involved.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So even a Senior doesn't have full authority. Guess someone even higher is involved.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So even a Senior doesn't have full authority. Guess someone even higher is involved.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That wraps up my business here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That wraps up my business here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That wraps up my business here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since I've checked that both your weapon and your staff are safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since I've checked that both your weapon and your staff are safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since I've checked that both your weapon and your staff are safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vI see.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vI see.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vI see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before you go, how about a meal?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before you go, how about a meal?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before you go, how about a meal?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My apprentice makes great steamed eggs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My apprentice makes great steamed eggs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My apprentice makes great steamed eggs.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
A kind offer, Seosaeng, and a heartwarming one
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
A kind offer, Seosaeng, and a heartwarming one
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
A kind offer, Seosaeng, and a heartwarming one
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: But ever since I got this body, I haven't been able to eat normal food.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But ever since I got this body, I haven't been able to eat normal food.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But ever since I got this body, I haven't been able to eat normal food.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Eek
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Eek
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Eek
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? So that wasn't a mask?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? So that wasn't a mask?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? So that wasn't a mask?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior, cleanup is complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior, cleanup is complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior, cleanup is complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our time is up. We should go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our time is up. We should go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our time is up. We should go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She wouldn't be happy to see us, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She wouldn't be happy to see us, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She wouldn't be happy to see us, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When causality permits, we shall meet again, Seosaeng.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When causality permits, we shall meet again, Seosaeng.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When causality permits, we shall meet again, Seosaeng.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Feels like a storm just passed through.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Feels like a storm just passed through.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Feels like a storm just passed through.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vYeah.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vYeah.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vYeah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Master.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't ever throw away your sword because of me again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't ever throw away your sword because of me again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't ever throw away your sword because of me again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like the Senior said, they came for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like the Senior said, they came for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like the Senior said, they came for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How could I dump that burden on anyone else?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How could I dump that burden on anyone else?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How could I dump that burden on anyone else?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who says I'm "anyone else," stupid Master?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who says I'm "anyone else," stupid Master?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who says I'm "anyone else," stupid Master?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, remember this! I'm not letting you die before me. No way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, remember this! I'm not letting you die before me. No way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, remember this! I'm not letting you die before me. No way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All that yelling tells me things are fine here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All that yelling tells me things are fine here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All that yelling tells me things are fine here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, granny! You're okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, granny! You're okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, granny! You're okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We got hit too. Assassins came here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We got hit too. Assassins came here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We got hit too. Assassins came here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But with help from the Administration, we pulled through.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But with help from the Administration, we pulled through.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But with help from the Administration, we pulled through.

8v?

The Administration
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
The Administration
8v?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Where are they now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where are they now?

records.m_Talk_DEU: They left. Just a little while ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They left. Just a little while ago.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't know why, but it seemed like they were avoiding you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't know why, but it seemed like they were avoiding you.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Jisoo.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Jisoo.

Whatever made them change, the reasons likely differ
8v

Whatever made them change, the reasons likely differ

root.m_Talk_ENG: But now, they're united under one cause. To bring down the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But now, they're united under one cause. To bring down the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But now, they're united under one cause. To bring down the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then why target us? If that's true, Master isn't even part of the Administration anymore!

8v

8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: They seem to see you, Seosaeng, as a threat to their goal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They seem to see you, Seosaeng, as a threat to their goal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They seem to see you, Seosaeng, as a threat to their goal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So the Administration helped me just to maintain that threat to their goal?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So the Administration helped me just to maintain that threat to their goal?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So the Administration helped me just to maintain that threat to their goal?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I cannot answer that. The response is beyond my authority.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I cannot answer that. The response is beyond my authority.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I cannot answer that. The response is beyond my authority.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So even a Senior doesn't have full authority. Guess someone even higher is involved.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So even a Senior doesn't have full authority. Guess someone even higher is involved.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So even a Senior doesn't have full authority. Guess someone even higher is involved.

root.m_Talk_FRA: That wraps up my business here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since I've checked that both your weapon and your staff are safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since I've checked that both your weapon and your staff are safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since I've checked that both your weapon and your staff are safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vI see.


8vI see.


8vI see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before you go, how about a meal?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Before you go, how about a meal?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My apprentice makes great steamed eggs.

root.m_Talk_FRA: My apprentice makes great steamed eggs.

8v



root.m_Talk_FRA: How could I dump that burden on anyone else?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Who says I'm "anyone else," stupid Master?
